rationale_source: Bug 1 Finding 1a isolation — payout-signal refinance (R11-B-3 carve-out fires → canonical combined=standalone=56). With Bug 1 gate-fix deployed, the gate consumes canonical standalone (56), so a clean payout-refi does NOT escalate even if the LLM ltv_percent is additive (103).

high_ltv_detected.rationale: Payout refinance: R11-B-3 carve-out fires (existing BMO paid out at closing + lender match) → canonical combined = standalone = 56% ≤ 80. No high-LTV escalation. CONTRAST with A14 (no payout signal → additive 103 → escalates).

awaiting_collateral.rationale: 56% canonical → no collateral ask. The Finding-1a isolation: with Bug 1 gate-fix, the gate uses canonical 56 (not LLM ltv_percent which may be additive 103).

workflow_state.rationale: Clean payout-refi at canonical 56% → active, awaiting admin prelim. NOT awaiting_collateral.

must_include.rationale: Canonical loan amount in the prelim Snapshot.

must_not_include.rationale: Payout refi at 56% must NOT trigger a collateral ask (the A14 mis-escalation, isolated away here).
